Latest available: Wed May 13 DPS arrived May 14 at 7:38 AM PT but Gmail MCP get_thread returns no parseable body — Net/Gross/Guests/Orders/Labor% require manual check in Toast app or browser. (2) Sling May 15 daily report not yet arrived at 4 AM run time (sends ~7:01 AM PT). Most recent: Sling May 14 received: 8 scheduled employees, 8 shifts, 38.74 hours, 0 OT, 0 uncovered. Staff (May 14): Rafael Patricio (Cook), Tony Rincon, Christine Vargas, Harmony Willson (Bartenders), Noel Nunez (Chef), Bri Kelley, James Hernadez (Servers), Cal Carter (Busser). (3) Reviews backlog: 7 unanswered. NEW Dympna Pettit 5★ Google May 14 (1 day, top priority). Deimos Somied 5★ now 5 days old. Lisa O'Brien now 34 days old. (4) Google Ads: 4 report emails received in last 48h (2 daily, 2 campaign performance). No disapprovals or auth errors flagged. Live scrape not refreshed at 4 AM run — dashboard shows last good snapshot from May 13 (May 12 data). (5) Yelp last 24h: only marketing newsletters, no customer inquiries or actionable items. Last good scrape May 13. (6) TripAdvisor: no new email in 24h — no ad performance report. (7) Reservations: today (Fri May 15) Stephen McCandlish 7:00 PM (3 guests). Tomorrow (Sat May 16): Kayla Escobar 12:15 PM (11 guests). (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
